text.title: Tailwind Architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Tailwind Architecture end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: establish-tokens
step.action: Move all values to tailwind.config / @theme; banish arbitrary values via lint.

step.name: wire-cn-util
step.action: Add clsx + tailwind-merge; project cn() in src/lib/utils.ts.
step.decision-gate: Reject raw clsx joins in lint.

step.name: extraction-threshold
step.action: Declare 5/3 rule; document named UI concept criterion.

step.name: scope-apply
step.action: Move @apply into @layer components CSS; remove from component files.
